role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Spanish text ('SE VENDE', 'SALIDA A DOS CALLES') and used it to distinguish Spain from other Spanish-speaking countries.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on architectural materials (brick, stone, terracotta) and street layout, which are landscape/architectural cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Correctly noted the absence of vegetation and used the 'arid/Mediterranean' environment as a weak signal.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Identified the STOP sign and used the language on the wall to rule out Portugal.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural features (rejas, brickwork) to support the Spain hypothesis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Spain. The linguistic agent provided the strongest evidence (Spanish text), which the tournament correctly used to eliminate non-Spanish-speaking candidates (Portugal, Italy) and distinguish Spain from other Spanish-speaking countries (Mexico, Colombia, etc.).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Brick, stone, and tiles accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: STOP sign and wall text accurately identified.
